mapper.sql: id, `name`, cid, description, num, sale, imgurl, `state`, price, version
mapper.insert:
insert into food
`name`,
cid,
description,
num,
sale,
imgurl,
`state`,
price,
version,
#{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{cid,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{description,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{num,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{sale,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{imgurl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{state,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{price,jdbcType=DOUBLE},
#{version,jdbcType=INTEGER},
mapper.update:
update food
`name` = #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
cid = #{cid,jdbcType=INTEGER},
description = #{description,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
num = #{num,jdbcType=INTEGER},
sale = #{sale,jdbcType=INTEGER},
imgurl = #{imgurl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
`state` = #{state,jdbcType=INTEGER},
price = #{price,jdbcType=DOUBLE},
version = #{version,jdbcType=INTEGER},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update food set `name` = #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, cid = #{cid,jdbcType=INTEGER}, description = #{description,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, num = #{num,jdbcType=INTEGER}, sale = #{sale,jdbcType=INTEGER}, imgurl = #{imgurl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `state` = #{state,jdbcType=INTEGER}, price = #{price,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, version = #{version,jdbcType=INTEGER} where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
